data.title: Shaun T’s Exclusives

seo.title: Shaun T's BOD Exclusives Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Try effective and fun workouts with Shaun T's BOD Exclusives. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Shaun T is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as Transform :20®, INSANITY®, CIZE®, and LET’S GET UP!™ Whether you’re new to exercise or a HIIT veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Keep a towel handy and be prepared to sweat—with Shaun T, it’s always go time.

data.descriptionShort: Shaun T will inspire you while working your entire body in these workouts.
data.descriptionLong: These effective and fun workouts give you a taste of the programs available from Shaun T. Whether you’re just ramping up or digging deeper, Shaun will inspire you to work your entire body.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Shaun T is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as Transform :20®, INSANITY®, CIZE®, and LET’S GET UP!™ Whether you’re new to exercise or a HIIT veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Keep a towel handy and be prepared to sweat—with Shaun T, it’s always go time.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNjSp6.title: Transform :20
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNjSp6.description: Step up the intensity in just 20 minutes a day with dynamic cardio moves.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNjSp6.descriptionShort: Step up the intensity in just 20 minutes a day with dynamic cardio moves.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNjSp6.descriptionLong: Transform :20 is a high-intensity, six-week workout and nutrition program that will help transform your body and mind in just 20 minutes a day.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQLXGi.title: Shaun T's NLC STACKED STRENGTH Workout
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQLXGi.descriptionLong: Fat blasting HIIT cardio drills, along with full-body resistance training, are what makes Shaun T's NLC STACKED STRENGTH workout a one-stop-shop for a complete heart-pounding workout.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Shaun T has helped millions of people get in the best shape of their lives with his transformational fitness programs. He is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as FOCUS T25, Transform :20, INSANITY, CIZE, and LET’S GET UP! Whether you’re new to fitness or a lifting veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Shaun will push you to work your hardest and show you just how much you’re capable of.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7t7cOH.title: Focus T25
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7t7cOH.description: No time to work out? Now you can get an hour’s results in just 25 minutes.
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7t7cOH.descriptionShort: No time to work out? Now you can get an hour’s results in just 25 minutes.
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7t7cOH.descriptionLong: With FOCUS T25, Shaun T brings you short, intense workouts that give you ridiculous results. 25 minutes is all it takes for you to get those ripped abs, lose the baby fat, and get your six-pack.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tDtCj.title: INSANITY MAX:30
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tDtCj.description: Shaun T brings you the craziest 30 minutes of your day
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tDtCj.descriptionShort: Shaun T brings you the craziest 30 minutes of your day
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tDtCj.descriptionLong: MAX:30 isn’t just INSANITY on fast forward. With 150 brand-new moves, it’s a whole new way to work out. Max-out a little farther each day, and when that happens, you’re going to look and feel amazing.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7vdcgS.title: Ramp It Up
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7vdcgS.descriptionLong: This quick, fun, and effective total-body workout will give you a taste of Shaun T's style and show you how to be successful with all of his programs. Featuring moves from FOCUS T25, Rockin' Body, and SHAUN WEEK, Shaun will inspire you and show you that you can do this!

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZF5Izb.title: CIZE
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZF5Izb.description: Learn the hottest choreographed dance moves and workouts with amazing results.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZF5Izb.descriptionShort: Learn the hottest choreographed dance moves and workouts with amazing results.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZF5Izb.descriptionLong: Shaun T and his crew bring the dance studio to you to teach you real choreographed dance workouts. You’ll have so much fun dancing and losing weight, you’ll forget you’re actually working out.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZJg3wJ.title: Shaun T's Exclusive 2021 Summit Workout
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZJg3wJ.descriptionLong: Grab a pair of dumbbells and prepare to sweat! This high-energy combination of weightlifting and bodyweight training will crank up your heart rate as you build strength, increase muscular endurance, and incinerate calories.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZJg8K3.descriptionLong: This combination of new and classic Shaun T moves will show you why he is the king of crushing calories. Be sure to have a towel, cuz you are going to SWEAT!

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZJgF1D.title: Dig Even Deeper
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZJgF1D.descriptionLong: For those who are ready to take their body and mind to the next level, this total-body workout is for you. Featuring moves from INSANITY and some of Shaun T's more challenging programs, Shaun will help you realize that when you're committed and focused, that's when you know you're ready to dig even deeper.
